message:
fix(config): wire up Provider and preset defaults for custom agents

Custom agents now infer their Provider from the command binary name
when it matches a known preset (e.g., gemini, claude). fillRuntimeDefaults
auto-fills Session, Tmux, PromptMode, and Instructions from preset
defaults when not explicitly set, so custom agents inherit lifecycle
metadata. Also adds --provider flag to gt config agent set.

Fixes #2943, #2944.

Co-Authored-By: mmlac <noreply@users.github.com>
